name: two-pass reconciler subagent output is restricted to the five labels same / refinement / adjacent / novel / conflict
command: printf '{"classification":"refinement"}\n' > sub.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/validate-classification.sh" --classification sub.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'label_valid=true' out.txt && grep -q 'label=refinement' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
